NOTICE OF RULING ON MOTION TO QUASH

LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. MOVING PARTY APPEARED. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED -- DEFENDANT MELINA WILLIAMS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: GRANTED: NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AN ORDER COMPLYING WITH CCP437C(G). HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855

LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS CONTINUED FROM OCT-22-2002 TO LAW AND MOTION AT OCT-31-2002, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301. MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. ARGUED AND CONTINUED TO DEPT 301. HON. A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II, REPORTER: PATRICIA EVEZICH, CSR# 1193

LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. WITNESSES SWORN AND EXAMINED. THE COURT, HAVING HEARD THE TESTIMONY, DENIED DEFENDANT MELINA WILLIAMS' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS, 5 DAYS TO ANSWER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON. JAMES J. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-26-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Erich Keefe, (Certified Legal Intern) and Ora S. Prochovnick, Esq. of NEW COLLEGE HOUSING ADVOCACY CLINIC 982-8399, X-305, moving for summary judgment
No appearance by plaintiff. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT MELINA WILLIAMS'
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: GRANTED -- no opposition filed. Prevailing party is to
prepare an order complying with CCP437c(g). (JJM/301) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR #7855

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Oct-31-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Melina Williams appearing in propria persona 826-5727, moving party
Carl L. Williams, GENERAL COUNSEL, S. F. HOUSING AUTHORITY 554-1334, for plaintiff
San Francisco Housing Authority, opposing party
* The parties produced witnesses as ordered and the Court ordered a hearing. Dwayne Ealy was sworn and examined on behalf of the plaintiff and Melina Williams was sworn and examined on her own behalf.
** The Court, having heard the testimony, DENIED Defendant MELINA WILLIAMS' MOTION TO
QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS, 5 days to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
(JJM/301/CW) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR #4780

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Oct-22-2002 Continued To Oct-31-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Melina Williams, Esq. appearing in propria persona with Delandreas Wedde 826-5727, moving to quash service
Carl Louis Williams, Esq. GENERAL COUNSEL, SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY 554-1334, for plaintiff and opposing party
* A R G U E D and the Court C O N T I N U E D DEFENDANT MELINA WILLIAMS' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS to October 31, 2002 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 301.
